StateMachine.name: Demo2
StateMachine.description: Demo FSM loaded through the factory that configures both Python and C++ child states through parameter remapping.

Param.name: shared_delay_ms
Param.description: Delay in milliseconds reused by both states.

Param.name: python_counter_prefix
Param.description: Prefix used by the Python FooState when formatting the counter string.

Param.name: python_max_count
Param.description: Maximum number of loops executed by the Python FooState.

Param.name: cpp_log_prefix
Param.description: Prefix used by the C++ BarState when printing the received counter string.

Key.name: foo_str
Key.description: String containing the current counter value produced by FooState.
